name: appcleaner
title: App Cleaner
description: Uninstall applications with AppCleaner, Pearcleaner, TrashMe 3 or App Cleaner & Uninstaller
author: dziad

commands.name: uninstall
commands.title: Uninstall Application
commands.description: Uninstall applications with AppCleaner, Pearcleaner, TrashMe 3 or App Cleaner & Uninstaller

preferences.name: uninstaller_app
preferences.title: Uninstaller App
preferences.description: Choose the uninstaller app you want to use for uninstalling applications.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
